title: wedelia kotschyi
intro: Wedelia kotschyi, also known as yellow flower or flor de limon, is a herbaceous perennial plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Wedelia kotschyi include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and fighting infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
